Connect to Microsoft Teams via the Graph API

Source: R/teams.R
get_teams_connection.Rd

Retrieves a bearer token for sending messages through the Microsoft Graph API. Checks ERIFUNCTIONS_TEAMS_TOKEN first; if absent, attempts the OAuth device-code flow using the app registered in ERIFUNCTIONS_APP_ID.

Usage

get_teams_connection(token = NULL)

Arguments

token

A pre-obtained bearer token string. Returned as-is.

Value

A bearer token string, or NULL with a warning if auth fails.

Details

On machines where conditional access blocks browser or device-code flows, use an incoming webhook instead: set ERIFUNCTIONS_TEAMS_WEBHOOK and call eri_teams_send() directly without a token.
